channel.title: ImageCatalog on CloudNativePG - PostgreSQL Operator for Kubernetes
channel.description: Recent content in ImageCatalog on CloudNativePG - PostgreSQL Operator for Kubernetes

item.title: CloudNativePG 1.29.0 Released!
item.description: CloudNativePG 1.29 is now generally available! This major update revolutionizes PostgreSQL extension management via Image Catalogs and the new artifacts ecosystem. We also announce maintenance releases 1.28.2 and the final 1.27.4. Upgrade today for enhanced security, dynamic networking, and enterprise IAM integration.

item.title: Sticking with Open Source: pgEdge and CloudNativePG
item.description: We talked to Matthew Mols, Sr. Director of Engineering at pgEdge, about how CloudNativePG enables them to meet the requirements of their customers using just open source.

item.title: CloudNativePG 1.23.0, 1.22.3 and 1.21.5 Released!
item.description: The CloudNativePG community has released the new 1.23 minor version and a new update for the supported 1.22 and 1.21 versions of the CloudNativePG operator.
